title: 4 - 5 - 26 Planted 12 plants now have 160 in apartment. Set up my 25 Nissan Arita Engage+ to camp.

transcript.text: I'm running out of time. This is my vlog for today, the 5th. I have to go to work in 10
Minutes and I haven't even eaten, so I have to eat some grapefruit. This is a really quick
Vlog. I have to do the daily vlog. I should have done it sooner. The time got away from
Me. Yeah, I came back from work. I did it overnight. I came back and then I slept right
Away. I was kind of tired last night. I had to have two cups of coffee. And then I slept
Until like 2.30 or something at 3. And then I went to the store and got a whole camping
Set up for my Aria, my new Nissan. I went to REI and got these two mattresses, air inflatrice
Mattresses. And they had this pump, so I went to the Home Depot and got a pump for it too.
I guess they inflate on their own, but with this you can do it faster and harder, so I
Don't know. I guess I could use a pump like that anyway for other things. I have like a
Ball there. And then I got like 15 more plants, 12 more plants, so now I have 160 plants in
My apartment. So that was my day. That was my whole day. Now I have to go to work again
At 7.20. Tomorrow, and then I'll be there until 8.30 tomorrow morning, and then tomorrow
I don't work. So yeah, I'll try to sleep in a little bit more and then clean. And then
As soon as I'm done cleaning, I can finally see if I can get caught up on my taxes and
Stuff and all that other stuff. And all the stuff having to do with my car. Yeah, so like
The legal stuff. So anyways, that's my vlog. I'm going to go and finish my grapefruit.
Didn't know exercise, but I will ride my bike to work today. I didn't yesterday because I
Had to, I only had 15 minutes to get there, but then one of the things was, the one that
I had to get there for was canceled, and I got in the car, and as I was in the car, I was
Like, oh shit, it was canceled. I had a half hour to get there. So anyways, yeah, that's
My day. Talk tomorrow.
